title: The Company Secretaries Act, 1980
full_text: The Company Secretaries Act, 1980 कंपनी सचिव अधिनियम, 1980 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198056 Act Number: 56 Enactment Date: 1980-12-10 Act Year: 1980 Short Title: The Company Secretaries Act, 1980 Hindi Title: कंपनी सचिव अधिनियम, 1980 Long Title: An Act to make provision for the regulation and development of the profession of Company Secretaries. Ministry: Ministry of Corporate Affairs Enforcement Date: 01-01-1981 Notification: 1st January, 1981, vide notification No. S.O. 989(E), dated 27th December, 1980, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. THE SECOND SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Company Secretaries Act, 1980 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II INSTITUTE OF COMPANY SECRETARIES OF INDIA CHAPTER III COUNCIL OF THE INSTITUTE CHAPTER IV REGISTER OF MEMBERS CHAPTER V MISCONDUCT CHAPTER VI REGIONAL COUNCILS CHAPTER VII PENALTIES CHAPTER VIIA QUALITY REVIEW BOARD CHAPTER IX DISSOLUTION OF THE INSTITUTE OF COMPANY SECRETARIES OF INDIA REGISTERED UNDER THE COMPANIES ACT CHAPTER X MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions and interpretation. Section 3. Incorporation of the Institute. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Entry of names in the Register of members. Section 5. Associates and Fellows. Section 6. Certificate of practice. Show Related Subordinates Section 7. Members to be known as Company Secretaries. Section 8. Disabilities. Show Related Subordinates Section 9. Constitution of the Council of the Institute. Show Related Subordinates Section 10. Re-election or re-nomination to Council. Show Related Subordinates Section 10A. Settlement of disputes regarding election. Show Related Subordinates Section 10B. Establishment of Tribunal. Show Related Subordinates Section 11. Nomination in default of election. Section 12. President and Vice-President. Show Related Subordinates Section 13. Resignation of membership and casual vacancies. Show Related Subordinates Section 14. Duration and dissolution of the Council. Show Related Subordinates Section 15. Functions of Council. Show Related Subordinates Section 15A. Functions of Institute. Section 15B. Imparting education by Universities and other bodies. Section 16. Officers and employees, salary, allowances, etc. Show Related Subordinates Section 17. Committees of the Council. Show Related Subordinates Section 18. Finances of the Council. Section 19. Register of members. Show Related Subordinates Section 20. Removal from the Register of members. Section 21. Disciplinary Directorate. Show Related Subordinates Section 21A. Board of Discipline. Show Related Subordinates Section 21B. Disciplinary Committee. Show Related Subordinates Section 21C. Authority, Disciplinary Committee, Board of Discipline and Director (Discipline) to have powers of civil court. Section 21D. Transitional provisions. Section 22. Professional or other misconduct defined. Section 22A. Constitution of Appellate Authority. Show Related Subordinates Section 22B. Term of office of members of Authority. Section 22C. Procedure, etc., of Authority. Show Related Subordinates Section 22D. Officers and other staff of Authority. Section 22E. Appeal to Authority. Section 23. Constitution and functions of Regional Councils. Section 24. Penalty for falsely claiming to be a member, etc. Section 25. Penalty for using name of the Council, or awarding degree of Company Secretary. Section 26. Companies not to engage in Company Secretaryship. Section 27. Unqualified persons not to sign documents. Section 28. Offences by companies. Section 29. Sanction to prosecute. Section 29A. Establishment of Quality Review Board. Show Related Subordinates Section 29B. Functions of Board. Section 29C. Procedure of Board Show Related Subordinates Section 29D. Terms and conditions of service of Chairperson and members of Board and its expenditure Show Related Subordinates Section 30. Amendment of Act 8 of 2006 Section 31. Dissolution of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India registered under the Companies Act.— Section 32. Transfer of assets and liabilities of the dissolved company to the Institute. Section 33. Provisions respecting employees of the dissolved company Section 34. Coordination Committee Section 35. Directions of the Central Government Section 36. Protection of action taken in good faith Section 36A. Members, etc., to be public servants. Section 37. Maintenance of branch offices. Section 38. Reciprocity Section 38A. Power of Central Government to make rules Show Related Subordinates Section 39. Power to make regulations. Section 40. Rules, regulations and notifications to be laid before Parliament. Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. THE SECOND SCHEDULE.
